speaker: ACHILLES
text: Come here about me, you my Myrmidons.

speaker: ACHILLES
text: Mark what I say. Attend me where I wheel.

speaker: ACHILLES
text: Strike not a stroke, but keep yourselves in breath,

speaker: ACHILLES
text: And, when I have the bloody Hector found,

speaker: ACHILLES
text: Empale him with your weapons round about.

speaker: ACHILLES
text: In fellest manner execute your arms.

speaker: ACHILLES
text: Follow me, sirs, and my proceedings eye.

speaker: ACHILLES
text: It is decreed Hector the great must die.
